dealSummary: Isomorphic Labs, an AI drug design company spun out of DeepMind, raised a $2.1 billion round led by Thrive Capital.
London-based AI data center specialist Nscale raised $790 million in financing from investors including ABN AMRO, DNB and Eksfin.
Berlin-based AI orchestration platform developer N8n secured a new investment from SAP at a valuation of over $5.2 billion.
Vancouver-based quantum computing startup Photonic received a C$275 million ($200 million) round led by Planet First Partners.
Agentic security operations startup Exaforce raised a $125 million Series B from investors including HarbourVest, Peak XV Partners and Seligman Ventures.
leadInvestors: HarbourVest, Peak XV Partners, Seligman Ventures

dealSummary: Havoc, the developer of autonomous systems for military and defense, received a $100 million Series A from investors including CCM Capital Markets, Clear Street and Cobalt Capital.
leadInvestors: CCM Capital Markets, Clear Street, Cobalt Capital

dealSummary: Star Catcher Industries, a company building power infrastructure in space, raised a $65 million Series A led by B Capital and co-led by Shield Capital and Cerberus Ventures.
leadInvestors: B Capital, co-led by Shield Capital, Cerberus Ventures

dealSummary: Voice AI startup Vapi secured a $50 million Series B led by Peak XV Partners.
Gaiia, which develops operating systems for communications service providers, raised a $40 million Series B led by JMI Equity.
Madrid-based treasury management startup Embat secured a €30 million Series B from investors including Cathay Innovation, Creandum and Samaipata.
Fifth Dimension, a London-based developer of an AI intelligence platform for real assets, raised a $26 million Series A led by HV Capital.
